page.title: Healthcare Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask questions about your health predictions and federated learning insights

welcome: Hello! I'm your CardioFL assistant. I can explain risk factors, federated learning, and lifestyle guidance. How can I help?
suggestedPrompts: What are the main risk factors?

mockReplies.risk factors: Key cardiovascular risk factors include age, cholesterol, blood pressure, smoking, diabetes, family history, and stress. The federated model weighs these using encrypted hospital data without sharing raw records.
mockReplies.prediction: Your risk score is a probability (0–100%) from the global model. Values at or above 50% are flagged HIGH. Always discuss results with a qualified clinician.
mockReplies.federated: Federated learning trains a shared model across hospitals. Each site keeps patient data local and only sends model weight updates to the central server for aggregation (FedAvg).
mockReplies.lifestyle: Evidence-based steps: 150 min moderate exercise weekly, reduce sodium, manage stress, 7–8 hours sleep, and smoking cessation if applicable.
mockReplies.default: I can help with risk interpretation, federated learning, and general wellness guidance. Try a suggested prompt or ask a specific question.

disclaimer: Medical Disclaimer: This assistant provides general information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice.
